creator: lists@bpsw.biz
text:
I approve. =20

I reviewed the changelog, diff'ed .92 to .93 sources, as well as =
installs and ensured that no changes to the Makefile (other than sizes, =
signatures and version number) are required.  I also applied the patch =
and confirmed that it builds and installs correctly with the new =
signatures.

On Jan 10, 2010, at 6:14pm, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of devel/p5-User-Identity,
>=20
> Please note that PR ports/142656 has just been submitted.
>=20
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>=20
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/142656
>=20
> --=20
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
